name: Prosper Engineering Public Company Limited
summary: Prosper Engineering Public Company Limited provides engineering systems, design, contractors, engineering consulting, and system maintenance services. The company offers civil and structural, architectural and interior, mechanical and electrical, renovation, and design and engineering works services; and electrical and communication, air conditioning and ventilation, and plumbing and fire protection system services. It operates and installs engineering systems in various types of buildings, which include shopping centers, superstores, product distribution centers, mobile telephone network centers, information centers, residential buildings, office buildings, government and public sector buildings, hospitals, and industrial factories. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
